title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.110 - Who may sue on bond — damages, how assessed
text:
521.110.  Who may sue on bond — damages, how assessed. — The bond given by the plaintiff, or other person, in a suit by attachment, may be sued on at the instance of any party injured, in the name of the state, to the use of such party, for the breach of the condition of such bond, and the damages shall be assessed thereon as on bonds with collateral condition.
(RSMo 1939 § 1448) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1284; 1919 § 1735; 1909 § 2304
